overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a journey through the industrial outskirts of Saint Denis at dawn. The player moves from railway tracks through narrow brick alleys and emerges into a busy industrial street with horse-drawn carriages and factory smokestacks visible through the morning haze.

events.description: turning left off the railway tracks toward the stables building
entering narrow alleyway between brick industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along railway tracks toward a stationary boxcar, then turning left into a narrow passage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with covered wagon moving from left to right across the tracks

entered.detail: metal railway tracks running straight ahead into the hazy distance
dark stationary boxcar sitting on the tracks ahead
multi-story brick warehouse building with FASS signage painted on the facade
tall wooden telegraph poles with multiple cross-arms lining the tracks
brick building with STABLES signage and large arched doorway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a hazy industrial railway siding with tracks leading toward a distant boxcar. A horse-drawn carriage crosses the tracks from the left as the camera moves forward. The camera then turns left toward a brick stables building, transitioning from the open tracks into a narrow enclosed alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between brick warehouse buildings

events.description: encountering two men standing against the brick wall on the left

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow cobblestone alley between tall brick walls, passing close to NPCs

notable_agents.action: two men standing against the brick wall, one wearing a hat and the other drinking from a bottle

entered.detail: tall red brick warehouse wall running along the left side of the narrow passage
weathered wooden double doors set into the brick wall
cast iron street lamp on a tall post
black wrought iron fence with stone pillars

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow, shadowed alley between high brick walls. Two men stand against the left wall as the camera passes close by. The passage is cobblestone and enclosed, with a street lamp and iron fence visible ahead as the alley opens slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial railway corridor approaching Saint Denis

events.description: emerging from narrow alley into open industrial area with Saint Denis sign arch visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the railway tracks through an industrial zone with increasing pedestrian and carriage activity

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the dirt road parallel to the tracks

entered.detail: large metal archway sign with SAINT DENIS lettering spanning across the railway
large multi-story brick factory building with many windows and industrial architecture

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley, the scene opens into a wider industrial corridor with railway tracks running through it. The Saint Denis sign arch becomes visible in the distance on the left, while a large factory building dominates the right side. The lighting becomes brighter as the camera moves back into the open hazy air.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy industrial thoroughfare with factory smokestacks

events.description: multiple horse riders and carriages passing by in both directions on the busy street

agents.ego_description: moving through a busy industrial street with active horse traffic and workers visible near the factory buildings

notable_agents.action: rider wearing red plaid shirt and bandana passing by on horseback moving in the same direction

entered.detail: tall industrial smokestacks emitting smoke visible against the bright sky in the background
wooden water tower structure visible behind the factory buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a busy industrial thoroughfare with multiple horse riders and carriages moving through the hazy morning light. The camera passes close to a rider in a red plaid shirt while moving toward the factory district. Smokestacks tower in the background against the bright dawn sky, and the railway tracks continue through the center of the muddy street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a hazy railway siding through a claustrophobic brick alleyway and out into a bustling industrial district at dawn. It begins on open tracks where a horse-drawn carriage crosses the path before the camera turns left, transitioning from the wide siding into a narrow, shadowed alley enclosed by high brick walls. As the camera passes two men leaning against the masonry, the cobblestone passage opens slightly toward a street lamp and iron fence. The scene then expands into a wider industrial corridor where the lighting brightens and the Saint Denis sign arch appears in the distance alongside a dominating factory building. Finally, the camera moves into a busy thoroughfare filled with riders and carriages, passing a man in a red plaid shirt as towering smokestacks emerge through the morning haze against a bright sky.
